description: Length-matched V2 facts for tissue-specific targeting and delivery optimization for genetic medicines.

facts.context: GalNAc (N-acetylgalactosamine) conjugation enables hepatocyte targeting by:
facts.truth: binding ASGPR on hepatocyte cell surfaces
distractors: diffusing through hepatocyte lipid bilayers
sequestering albumin in the portal vein
activating Kupffer cell uptake pathways

facts.context: Transferrin receptor targeting for brain delivery works because:
facts.truth: TfR on brain endothelium drives transcytosis
distractors: transferrin diffuses through lipid bilayers
TfR concentrates in peripheral tissue beds
iron chelation weakens tight junction seals

facts.context: Antibody-drug conjugates (ADCs) achieve tumor selectivity through:
distractors: uniform distribution across all tissue types
extracellular cleavage within tumor stroma
complement lysis at the tumor cell surface

facts.context: Lipid nanoparticles naturally accumulate in liver because:
facts.truth: ApoE adsorption targets hepatocyte LDL receptors
distractors: hepatic sinusoids filter by surface charge
Kupffer cells endocytose all lipid particles
bile salt coating drives nanoparticle uptake

facts.context: LNP delivery to spleen and immune cells is enhanced by:
facts.truth: incorporating anionic lipids and adjusting PEG
distractors: using standard hepatocyte-targeting lipid mix
increasing particle size beyond 500 nanometers
coating with cationic polymers on the surface

facts.context: AAV serotypes with muscle tropism (AAV8, AAV9) achieve this by:
facts.truth: binding specific receptors on muscle fiber surfaces
distractors: transducing all tissue types at equal efficiency
accumulating via elevated viral titer injection
exploiting nonspecific electrostatic membrane bonds

facts.context: Intrathecal delivery of gene therapies for CNS diseases:
facts.truth: bypasses the BBB, reaching CSF and spinal cord
distractors: distributes identically to intravenous dosing
restricts expression to brain cortex alone
requires high systemic doses for motor neurons

facts.context: Subretinal injection for retinal gene therapy:
facts.truth: reaches RPE and photoreceptors with low systemic exposure
distractors: distributes uniformly across all ocular compartments
requires concurrent systemic immunosuppression therapy
transduces retinal ganglion cells but not photoreceptors

facts.truth: above 100nm clears via liver; below 10nm renally
distractors: particles of all sizes distribute identically
larger particles cross more tissue barriers
renal clearance dominates above 200 nanometers

facts.context: Endosomal escape is critical for nucleic acid delivery because:
facts.truth: cargo must reach the cytoplasm or nucleus to act
distractors: endosomal compartments serve as activation sites
lysosomal degradation boosts therapeutic effects
endosomal acidification triggers cargo activation
